entities.name: NUTRIENT APPLICATION
entities.description: The application of nutrients to mitigate the effects of iron toxicity in rice

entities.name: IRON TOXICITY
entities.description: A widespread nutrient disorder that affects rice growing in inland swamps and irrigated lowland soils

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop affected by iron toxicity in lowland areas of West Africa

entities.name: INLAND SWAMPS
entities.description: Areas where rice is grown and susceptible to iron toxicity

entities.name: IRRIGATED LOWLAND SOILS
entities.description: Soils where rice is grown and susceptible to iron toxicity

entities.name: HUMID FOREST
entities.description: A zone in West Africa where iron toxicity affects rice

entities.name: SAVANNA ZONES
entities.description: A zone in West Africa where iron toxicity affects rice

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the nutrient disorder is widespread

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of rice, which is reduced by iron toxicity

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a rice cultivar to withstand the effects of iron toxicity
